alkylation reagent: alkylated using 10 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min
alkylation concentration: alkylated using 10 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min
cleavage agent: digested using sequencing grade Lys-C/trypsin mixture
collision energy: with a normalized collision energy of 28
fractionation method: fractionated with poly(styrenedivinylbenzene) reverse phase sulfonate (SDB-RP) stage tips
fragmentation method: automated switching between MS and MS/MS
instrument: coupled online to a Q Exactive™ HF mass spectrometer
ionization type: The ion source was operated in positive ion mode
labeling: quantification by label free quantitation (LFQ) analysis
